_meta.description: GSB Realtor — 3 daily social media cron workflows for n8n import
_meta.import_instructions: In n8n, go to Workflows → Import from File → select this file OR copy each workflow object individually. After import: (1) add your Telegram Bot credential under Settings → Credentials, (2) activate each workflow.

data._note: Get from @BotFather on Telegram. The bot ID 8787916937 should already have a token. Go to n8n Settings → Credentials → New → Telegram API → paste the token.
Get from Meta Business Suite → Settings → Page Access Tokens. Add as HTTP Request header credential.
Get from developer.twitter.com → Your App → Keys and Tokens
Use n8n built-in LinkedIn OAuth2 credential. Go to Credentials → New → LinkedIn OAuth2 API → authorize with your LinkedIn account.

sample_telegram_output._description: This is what the Telegram message will look like based on today's live API data (2026-03-31)

💼 LINKEDIN:
Real Estate Insight — Tuesday

Practical advice from years in the Utah market:

Mortgage pre-approval is not optional — it's your foundation.

In Utah's competitive market, unverified buyers are ignored. Pre-approval signals seriousness, defines your budget, and enables fast action when the right property appears.

Simple process, significant impact on outcomes.

Questions about the Utah market or buying process?
📞 801-635-8462 | gsbrealtor.com

Gurpreet Bhatti | REALTOR® | USMC Veteran | GSB Realtor

🎵 TIKTOK SCRIPT:
Real estate tip for Tuesday. Always get pre-approved before you start looking at homes. I see buyers lose their dream home every week because they skipped this one step. It takes 24 hours and costs nothing. Don't be that buyer. Follow me for more Utah real estate tips, and text me at 801-635-8462 when you're ready to make a move.
